title: [Sim] Add dynamic string type and basic ops
body:
Added the Dynamic String Type and support for basic Dynamic String Ops in the Sim dialect. I have chosen to keep the string concatenation op n-ary instead of binary now in line with CIRCT conventions, and I will also implement an Op that enables us to print `sim.dstring` later by converting it into a `sim.fstring`. 

Overall:
I plan to add support for dynamic strings, and this is one of the patches that implements this. I will be making different patches for:
1. Lowering Moore to Sim (and ImportVerilog to Moore, if needed)
2. Lowering Sim to Arcilator, and 
3. Implementing the actual semantics of the string in the Arcilator runtime
